zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Scudamore於1305年出生在英國賀福爾肯丘其時，他的父親Sir John Scudmore25歲，母親Jane Baskerville21歲。他和Joyce Marbury至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1385年在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Scudamore于1305年出生在英国賀福爾肯丘其时，他的父亲Sir John Scudmore25岁，母亲Jane Baskerville21岁。他和Joyce Marbury至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1385年在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scudamore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Skidmore
meanings: English (Staffordshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Scudamore, which most probably arises from a Norman French nickname for a knight who used a particular type of leather shield, from the unrecorded Norman French phrase, escu de more ‘Moor's shield’, a reference to a type of Moorish leather shield called an adarga, which was in widespread use not only in medieval Iberia and north Africa but also in Brittany.

History: The manor of Upton Scudamore in Wiltshire was held by Peter de Skydemore in 1216. The same manor was held by Godfrey Escudamore shortly after 1150. The Scudamore family claim descent from Ralph, recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holder of Opeton (Upton), whose son was known as Reginald Escudemor.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Scudamore was born in 1305, in Kentchurch, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir John Scudmore, was 25 and his mother, Jane Baskerville, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Joyce Marbury. He died in 1385, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 80.

Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Joyce Marbury. Il est décédé en 1385, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 80 ans.

Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Joyce Marbury. Morì nel 1385, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 80 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Scudamore(이)가 1305년 영국 허퍼드실르 켄트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Scudmore(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Baskerville(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Joyce Marbury(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.
